name: Blackwing - Gust the Backblast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>逆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のガスト
desc: If you control no cards, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If your opponent's monster attacks a "Blackwing" monster you control: The attacking monster loses 300 ATK during the Damage Step only.
mnst_eff: If you control no cards, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If your opponent's monster attacks a "Blackwing" monster you control: The attacking monster loses 300 ATK during the Damage Step only.
eff: If you control no cards, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If your opponent's monster attacks a "Blackwing" monster you control: The attacking monster loses 300 ATK during the Damage Step only.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
